title: Docker Essential Commands
description: Core Docker commands for building, running, and managing containers.

entries.label: Build Image
entries.description: Build an image from a Dockerfile in the current directory

entries.label: Run Container
entries.description: Run a container in detached mode with port mapping

entries.label: Compose Up
entries.description: Start all services defined in docker-compose.yml

entries.label: Exec into Container
entries.description: Open an interactive shell inside a running container

entries.label: View Logs
entries.description: Follow the last 100 lines of a container's logs

entries.label: List Containers
entries.description: List all containers including stopped ones

entries.label: Remove Container
entries.description: Force remove a container even if running

entries.label: System Prune
entries.description: Remove all unused containers, images, and volumes
